faults.Title: FLT-MQOU7M03
faults.Description:
The roof top air cooled condenser heat exchange fins have corroded since the installation in
2017, therefore the lower section of fins was physically removed to regain air flow and
performance from the condenser.
Although there are no operational issues until the ambient temperature reaches 29oC, then
compressor trips occur.

As per Johns end of contract report
faults.ActionTaken: quote to be sent to border
